title: Dark Mode in Frameworks Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of Tailwind's dark: variant, Bootstrap's data-bs-theme attribute, and best practices for user-centric theme switching.

questions.question: Which prefix would you use in Tailwind to apply a style specifically for dark mode?
In Bootstrap 5.3+, which attribute is commonly used on the <html> tag to enable dark mode for the entire page?
Which and/or what is the key difference between the 'media' and 'selector' strategies for dark mode in Tailwind?
options: Media strategy follows the user's OS settings, while Selector strategy allows manual toggling (by adding a .dark class).

questions.question: Does providing a dark mode option improve the user experience and reduce eye strain in low-light environments?
options: Yes, as it is a core modern UX standard.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the best practice for professional dark mode implementations to ensure consistency across user sessions?
options: Storing the user preference in a separate database.
Storing the user preference in 'localStorage' within the browser.
Using only standard HTML meta tags.
